hero_subtitle: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, originator and beneficiary data, and routing status into one compliance workflow that supports exception handling and preserves audit evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_title: Travel Rule messages remain disconnected from cases
problem_description: Payment providers often handle Travel Rule messages and status updates across multiple tools without clear linkage to originator or beneficiary data. This separation slows routing, delays exception resolution, and weakens audit evidence for ongoing compliance workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links originator and beneficiary data, message status, provider outputs, exception handling and audit evidence into a unified workflow so payment providers can route, review and resolve Travel Rule cases efficiently.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule message to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule data through message tracking, exception handling, case creation, evidence preservation and consolidated compliance reporting for payment providers.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule message routing, exceptions, cases and audit evidence into one provider-neutral compliance layer tailored for payment provider operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports payment providers with controlled message routing, exception handling, audit evidence and enterprise deployment for structured Travel Rule compliance workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for payment providers?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides payment providers a compliance control layer connecting Travel Rule messages, wallet data, cases and audit evidence into one operational workflow for clearer supervision and risk management.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY route Travel Rule messages?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes originator and beneficiary data through configured Travel Rule providers, tracks message status, handles exceptions, and integrates routing into broader compliance cases and review workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence by recording message history, exception cases, routing decisions and reviewer actions to support defen sible compliance reviews and reporting readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects with multiple Travel Rule providers without replacing them, connecting their outputs into a centralized compliance workflow and structured case management environment.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into workflow, cases and evidence rather than replacing existing compliance or routing systems.
final_title: Review Travel Rule routing and audit evidence
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects payment provider Travel Rule messages, exception handling, cases and evidence into one compliance workflow.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
